name: Barbeque Beef and Pork
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients (except the buns) in a crockpot.
2. Cook on low setting for 8-10 hours or until meat is tender.
3. Stir with a fork to break up pieces.
4. Serve on buns.
You may use all pork or all beef. The pork cooks faster than the beef, so start the beef ahead of time and then add the pork.
